brand.taglineShort: The toolkit for the weekend tinkerer.

homepage.h1: The toolkit for the weekend tinkerer.
homepage.subhead: Honest reviews of soldering stations, bench multimeters, entry-level oscilloscopes, starter kits, and the small-batch tools that actually matter. Written by someone who spent 40 years in electronics and still tests everything on a cluttered home bench.
homepage.trustLine: Every tool bought with our own money. Every test run on our own bench. No manufacturer gifts. Not sponsored by Amazon or anyone.

about.headline: Why TinkerBench exists
about.body: The hobby electronics world is flooded with $30 garbage soldering stations with five-star reviews and real $200 stations that outlive their owners. Sorting the two takes either 40 years of experience or an honest site to read. We are the second one. Every review clearly states who the tool is for, who it is not for, and what you should actually buy first.
